heading: Prohibition on nationwide database
label: 7911 Prohibition on nationwide database
text: Nothing in this chapter (other than ) shall be construed to authorize the development of a nationwide database of personally identifiable information on individuals involved in studies or other collections of data under this chapter.section 6398(b) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7911, , as added , , , set out administrative provisions, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter IX of this chapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title IX, § 9211Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3804Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994
